result:
Added a new no-argument `graph` CLI command in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go) that walks the notebook’s `[[note-id]]` links and prints deterministic Graphviz DOT. It includes all existing notes as nodes, emits edges for each outgoing wiki link, and renders missing link targets as dashed nodes so broken references still appear in the graph. I also wired `graph` into command dispatch and usage output.

Added coverage in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go) for DOT output, argument rejection, and `run([]string{"graph"})`, and documented the command in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test` because this sandbox does not have `go` or `gofmt` installed on `PATH`, so the change is manually reviewed but not toolchain-verified here.
